title: Snowy Biomes: Enhanced
description: Better Snowy Biomes: Adds white turning leaves while snowfall (like in Bedrock), smooth snow and much more
body:
Hey, this is Better Snowy Biomes, a project aiming to improve the vanilla snowy biomes.

Make sure to put the "**Biome Blend**" graphic setting to its **maximum** for the best experience!

### Compatibility

Tectonic: Put the fabric mods over Tectonic in the datapack section when generating a world. The datapack versions are not supporting Tectonic.

Quilt: You need [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl), otherwise it won't work.

I'd not recommend you to use it with other world gen mods such as Terralith or Geophilic.

### Features

_Snow under trees; Snow makes leaves snowy_
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f19962d1f4f7044fd3dabe86132c4a9b81aca07.jpeg)

_Easy Tectonic support_
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e7feffdd481b58b845b0c9eb5d42ffb114af32.jpeg)

_Smooth Snow: Inspired by Terralith; made with own code_
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7f3881aa18c824b0a6a9863f1aac1a6b200beb.jpeg)
